---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an improvement or new feature
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What problem does this solve?

Describe the problem you are facing.

## What solution are you proposing?

Describe the feature you would like to see.

## Why is this valuable?

Who benefits from this? How many users does it affect?

## Are you willing to implement this?

- [ ] Yes, I can build this and submit a Pull Request
- [ ] No, I need someone else to build it
- [ ] I need help but can contribute partially

## Additional context

Any mockups, examples, or references that might help.
